text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Rice Shower is in her signature racewear
for an interview. She's currently on standby.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Deep breaths, deep breaths... In... and out...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A little...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I got the questions beforehand and was able
to practice my answers, so I'll be okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still speaking when the interviewer runs over
toward us in a panic.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Rice Shower. I'm so sorry, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
The questions we sent you before were actually
intended for a different interview...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
There was some kind of mix-up, and they were
given to you by mistake.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
You have my sincerest apologies! I understand
that you've prepared answers for those
questions...

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text: What should we do? Do we have to cancel?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the interview staff look troubled. I'm also
thinking about what we should do, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...A-actually!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You can... ask me whatever you want! Even
questions I didn't prepare for are okay!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: If I can answer, then I will.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text:
R-really? If you're sure, that would really help us
out.
choice_data_list:
If that's okay with you, then please let her do
the interview.

If that's okay with you, then please let her do
the interview.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
Well, as long as you're both okay with it... Thank
you.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer A
text_block_list.text: Truly, thank you! Shall we get started then?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Yes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower answers the questions confidently,
and the interview goes off without a hitch.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...How did I do, Big Brother?
choice_data_list: How do you think you did?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...How did I do, Big Sister?
choice_data_list: How do you think you did?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I got so much courage from wearing these clothes
during the interview. It was just like when I'm
racing!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... But not just the clothes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What's supported me the most... and given me
the most courage...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is you, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Is you, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She cracks a small, happy smile.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I think that—well, just a little bit, but...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm finally worthy of wearing these clothes.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's embarrassing to say that about myself.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...That's because you believed in me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...That's because you believed in me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So please, please, always believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I nod reassuringly, and she smiles at me joyfully.
